rationale: Xi's confirmed visit to Pyongyang solidifies the China-DPRK-Russia axis, directly relevant to Ukraine's war effort and Western support dynamics; no new battlefield escalation reported.

top_events.title: Xi Jinping arrives in Pyongyang to revitalise China-North Korea ties
top_events.summary: Xi's confirmed visit deepens the authoritarian bloc supporting Russia; strengthened China-DPRK ties mean continued political and potentially material backing for Russia's war against Ukraine.

top_events.title: US-Iran war to pull global economy to post-COVID low: World Bank
top_events.summary: World Bank recession warning continues; Western economic strain could reduce capacity and political will for Ukraine aid packages.

top_events.title: Vance says Israeli PM Netanyahu 'has got some things wrong'
top_events.summary: US political attention and bandwidth remain consumed by Middle East; indirect signal that Ukraine may face continued competition for US strategic focus.
